title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the purpose and future of education.

questions.question: Do you think the main purpose of education is to prepare people for work, or does it have a broader purpose?
Should university education be free for all students? Why?

script.text: Some people argue that exams and grades put too much pressure on young people. Do you agree with this view?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
